use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for web interfaces requiring visual feedback
Interactive button with expanding circle hover animation effect
Form submission or navigation trigger with decorative styling
ai_summary: An interactive button component featuring an expanding circular animation triggered on hover. The button showcases a dark gray background with an orange accent color, decorative SVG wave elements at the edges, and a subtle gradient overlay. The hover effect creates a smooth expanding circle from the center, providing visual feedback to users.
